content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: Pull Request opened - feat/review-psepk-algg
b. This is a request for code review feedback on a salvaged P. putida Algg gene review
c. Key information:
   - PR contains 6 new files: ai-review.yaml, deep-research, GOA data, UniProt data, and 2 publications
   - 794 additions, 0 deletions - all new content
   - Files are for P. putida algG gene (alginate biosynthesis)
   - Contains salvaged work from uncommitted agent work
d. Main tasks:
   - Review the ai-review.yaml file for quality and adherence to schema
   - Check deep research content for accuracy and completeness
   - Validate data files are properly formatted
   - Assess overall code quality and best practices
e. Plan:
   - Read CLAUDE.md for repo-specific guidelines
   - Examine all changed files systematically
   - Validate YAML against schema if possible
   - Provide comprehensive feedback on content quality, structure, and adherence to guidelines
f. Potential limitations: May need validation tools that require specific permissions
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request containing the salvaged P. putida Algg gene review. Let me start by creating a todo list and then systematically examining all the files.

input.body: ### PR Review: P. putida Algg Gene Review Reviewing the salvaged P. putida algG gene review files for code quality, best practices, and adherence to project guidelines. ### Todo List: - [ ] Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Review ai-review.yaml file structure and content - [ ] Examine deep research content quality - [ ] Check data files (GOA, UniProt) formatting - [ ] Review publication files - [ ] Validate YAML schema compliance - [ ] Assess overall code quality and best practices - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23419522144)

content.text: Let me start by reading the repository guidelines to understand the project structure and requirements.
